text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest—a huge event
wherein Tracen Academy opens its doors to fans
of all ages. This year, however...

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text:
Mommy, do you think I'll get to see Oguri up
close?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh, don't you worry! It is very crowded, but I'm sure we'll get to see Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what? Oguri's event isn't until later? So I
rushed out the door for nothing... Still, I just can't
wait!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: Man, it sure is packed, though. Is everyone here to see Oguri? She's so ridiculously popular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The event is flooded with Oguri Cap fans, eager
to get a glimpse of her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere of the Fan Fest is truly amazing. I
suppose that's Oguri for you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Seeing all these jubilant fans so excited to meet
Oguri has made me wonder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: How exactly... should I be interacting with fans?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've always focused on claiming victory over my
rivals and giving each race everything I have so
that people might remember the me of that
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My own light shines ever brighter as I garner more
and more experience competing against my
precious rivals, and that light has formed an
irrefutable trail behind me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With all the focus I've directed elsewhere,
though, I think it could be said that I haven't
devoted much attention to fans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I have poured my heart and soul into
my winning concerts, to express my gratitude to
the fans who come to watch my races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But then, as an Umamusume who lives to race,
that's but a matter of course. Was there more I
could have done for them?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I can't help but wonder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...You see, I'm actually scheduled to participate in
an event with Oguri later today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The notion of racing against her doesn't frighten
me at all. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The thought of facing so many fans, and
entertaining them alongside her... Well, that's a
different matter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm unsure as to how to approach the event, and I
must admit it's making me somewhat anxious.
choice_data_list: Why not imagine it's a race?
Why not imagine it's a race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan puts everything she has into each
race, and I think that devotion is exactly what her
fans are dazzled by.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she commits herself to this Fan Fest event in the
same way she commits to her races, then her fans
will get exactly what they came here to see.
choice_data_list: Go all out and the fans will love you.
Go all out and the fans will love you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Are you certain?
choice_data_list:
I am, so get out there and knock those fans'
socks off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe! Your choice of words is as entertaining as
ever, Trainer... and reassuring, too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The wait is over! Our next "Improv Race" will be
betweeeen...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Mejiro Ardan! Come ooon
dowwwn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I look forward to our competition.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Same. Good luck.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Same as always, after we give our
contestants some prompts, they'll have to come
up with the funniest answer they possibly can, and
then it'll be up to you, the fans, to decide the
winner!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your hosts will be me—Super Creek—and
Tamtam, whom you know as Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Da heck is this lineup, though?! These gals are so oblivious, they can't even catch jokes, let alone make 'em! I'm gonna turn into a skeleton waitin'!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aw, but Oguri and Ardan are such honest and
innocent little cuties. It warms my heart just
looking at them!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
See?! This is exactly what I mean! Creek doesn't
even realize she's one of the airheads!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama really is something. She can entertain
everyone so effortlessly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Improv Q&A... While I've never done anything like this before, it is a battle of wits involving rapid wordplay... so it's not entirely different from racing!)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's get this started with the first prompt!
"Tamtam nearly tripped over her own feet rushing
out the dorm this morning. Why?"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait, why's da prompt about me?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (That was so fast!)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri's first up! Okay, what's your answer?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
To be first in line for the cafeteria's limited-time
special, eggs-travagant eggs benedict!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You did that yesterday! YOU !

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I refuse to lose!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're up, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Tamamo is a straight-laced hard worker and I
expect her roommate relies on her for certain
things. As such...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To retrieve breakfast from the cafeteria for
Oguri, who overslept!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think I am, Oguri's lackey? Her mom?!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you've both tickled tons of funny
bones! This should be a close match!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nice one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have every intention of putting up a fight.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh no. These idiots are actually gonna do the whole routine. We're cooked, guys...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A dead heat (of sorts) rages on between Mejiro
Ardan and Oguri Cap...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: All right, the votes are in!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I made so many quips... I'm losin' my...
voice...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri, by a hair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Male Ardan Fan
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Male Ardan Fan
text_block_list.text:
You were so close! But you were really hilarious!
Nice job out there!

text_block_list.name: Female Ardan Fan
text_block_list.text: I never get to see this side of you at the track! It's soooo cute! I hope you do this again someday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(What a relief... It appears the fans enjoyed
themselves!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It looks like both our fans had a good time. That's
good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... It is indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's have another contest for the fans sometime.
We could do improv again... or take it to the
track!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The competitors are shaking hands! What a
beautiful sight!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Know what? Someone else come take da mic. I
give up...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ardan, by a hair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...?! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Male Ardan Fan
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Male Ardan Fan
text_block_list.text: You were hilarious! Do this again, okay?! I'll be first in line to get tickets!

text_block_list.name: Female Ardan Fan
text_block_list.text: I never get to see this side of you at the track! It's soooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Ardan Fans
text_block_list.text:
Ardan! Mejiro Ardan!
Miss Ardan!
Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Have I... always had this many fans?!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It looks like both our fans had a good time. That's
good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... It is indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's have another contest for the fans sometime.
We could do improv again... or take it to the
track!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's. And next time, I shan't lose!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The competitors are shaking hands! What a
beautiful sight!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Know what? Someone else come take da mic. I
give up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's event ends on a high note, but
elsewhere, at this very moment...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've been away for so long, and yet so all these
people have come to see me? I... I don't know
what to say!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I hear you have a major announcement
to make. Whatever could it be?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I, Sakura Chiyono O... plan to return to racing at
this year's Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm currently working as hard as I can on my final
preparations! I really hope you'll all look forward
to my comeback with bated breath!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My name is Sakura Chiyono O... and I will
blossom on the turf once more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With word of Sakura Chiyono O's return
spreading like wildfire, everyone's suddenly
talking about the Takarazuka Kinen!
